title: Install EVE through npx
summary: EVE now ships a scoped npm installer that downloads and verifies platform-specific release binaries, installs the CLI for the current user, and configures MCP clients.
userVisibleChange: Users can install EVE once with npx @nhestrompia/eve@latest install, then run eve init in any repository.

risks.title: The npm scope and NPM_TOKEN GitHub Actions secret must be configured before the first tagged npm publication.
The CLI version must match the release tag so installer version verification succeeds.

decisions.title: Use the scoped @nhestrompia/eve package because the unscoped eve package belongs to another active project.
Install the native binary in a user-owned bin directory and configure MCP with its absolute path.

validation.command: npm --prefix ui test && npm --prefix ui run build
